name: GPT-5.5 Instant
summary: ChatGPT's new default model — 52.5% fewer hallucinations, 30% shorter responses, and personalization from past chats, files, and connected Gmail; live for all ChatGPT users and as chat-latest in the API

name: Cloudflare + Stripe Agent Provisioning
summary: open protocol that lets coding agents create Cloudflare accounts, register domains, grab API tokens, and deploy code with no human in the loop — Stripe handles payment with a default $100/month per-provider cap

name: Novi Long Video Agent
summary: creative agent that turns a script or story idea into a complete narrative video up to 5 minutes — bundles script generation, multi-scene visuals across Seedance 2.0, PixVerse C1, and Wan 2.7, and synced voiceover into one workflow

name: Midjourney V8.1
summary: image gen update — HD mode 3x faster and 3x cheaper than V8.0, standard renders 50% faster and 25% cheaper, brings back image prompts and adds a Prompt Shortener; live on midjourney.com and Discord

name: Cursor SDK
summary: TypeScript SDK that turns Cursor's coding agent into programmable infrastructure — npm install @cursor/sdk, run agents locally or on Cursor's sandboxed cloud VMs from CI, backend services, or your own product, billed per-token

name: Pika Agents
summary: creative AI partner with a face, voice, and personality you design — orchestrates Pika, Kling, MiniMax, and Veo from natural-language chat with persistent memory across sessions; runs in the web app and connected messaging apps

name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni
summary: open multimodal model unifying vision, audio, and language → text with 9x higher throughput than other open omni models — weights live on Hugging Face and OpenRouter, also via NVIDIA NIM

name: DeepSeek V4
summary: open-source flagship in two sizes (V4-Pro 1.6T params, V4-Flash 284B) with 1M token context and Hybrid Attention — preview weights on Hugging Face, API at $0.28/M tokens for Flash and $3.48/M for Pro
